title: FYI â February 2021
body_text:
FYI â February 2021
FYI â February 2021
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Bill Payments Volume
Electronic Bill Payments System Part
Section 1.2, Financiaul Institution Transaction Limit
We updated the Electronic Bill Payments System Part with a new image of Financial Institution Transaction Limit Modification Request, Form 2424, and moved the instructions on completing it to Section 1.2, Financial Institution Transaction Limit.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
FX Notes Plus Part
Section 11.3, Entering Foreign Cheques in FX Notes Plus
We added text to clarify that when the system identifies an item as a cash letter, your financial institution can choose whether to process it as a cash letter or as a cheque collection. When the system identifies an item as a cheque collection, your only option is to put it on collection.
Currency Volume
Provincial Concentrator Account Deposits Part
Section 3.3, Chargebacks
We corrected the CIBC transit number where dishonoured items should be returned to (00090-010).
Document Library
Status
Financial Institution Transaction Limit Modification Request
2424
We updated the Financial Institution Transaction Limit Modification Request, Form 2424, with space to record the transit number you want debited for transaction limit changes. We also noted that changes to your financial institutionâs bill payment transaction limit does not affect any unique biller limits you may have established (maximum of ten billers and applicable to real-time clients only).
Revised
Questions
Central 1, Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878
, Option 1, email
support@central1.com
